summary: All 12 tasks completed. Unified code review pipeline orchestrator implemented with runReviewPipeline(), MCP tool run_code_review, and CLI flags --comment/--ci/--deep/--no-mechanical.
learnings: Linter/prettier renamed PipelineResult to ReviewPipelineResult and runPipeline to runReviewPipeline during pre-commit hooks — all downstream references needed updating
lint-staged stash/restore continues to pull in unstaged changes from working tree into unrelated commits — same recurring pattern from prior sessions
exactOptionalPropertyTypes requires conditional spreading (graph != null ? { graph } : {}) when passing optional fields that may be undefined from destructuring
ChangedFile type from feedback module does not have a diff field — fileDiffs must be populated from raw diff string instead
